VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists as arXiv:2503.07365v1 with the title "MM-Eureka: Exploring Visual Aha Moment with Rule-based Large-scale Reinforcement Learning" — matching the cited title closely (only capitalization differs). The cited author list of 14 is a minor discrepancy from the actual 15 authors; the missing author is Tiancheng Han. The cited title differs from the updated arXiv version's title, but matches the original v1 submission exactly.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.07365v1
